title: How we build
subtitle: Six principles on every product we ship — our SaaS and yours.

cards.title: Keep it simple
cards.text: Systems people understand, teams can run, and we can extend without rework.

cards.title: Build for reliability
cards.text: Production-ready from day one — architecture, tests, releases, and monitoring.

cards.title: Solve real problems
cards.text: Every feature serves a clear business or user outcome. Nothing for the sake of shipping.

cards.title: Think long term
cards.text: Patterns you can grow into — not throwaway demos that expire in six months.

cards.title: Ship with discipline
cards.text: Clear milestones, demos, and scope so you always know what's next and why.

cards.title: Own the result
cards.text: Docs, handover, and support after launch — so the product keeps delivering.
